name: Hawaiian Bon Bons
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the white chocolate into small pieces and place them in a 1-quart glass bowl.
2. Heat the chocolate in the microwave on medium for 2 minutes, stirring until melted.
3. Return the chocolate to the microwave and heat an additional 1/2 to 2 minutes, or until smooth when stirred.
4. Stir in the macadamia nuts, flaked coconut, and orange zest.
5. Carefully spoon the mixture into 25 (1 1/2 inch) paper bon bon cups, filling each to the top.
6. Allow the bon bons to stand at room temperature for 1 hour or refrigerate for longer until firm.
7. Store the filled cups in the refrigerator, well wrapped.
